notes:
{"notes":"

What's new

  • Onboarding guide for new users — set your hotkey and learn about spaces on first launch.
  • System tray icon with Show/Hide and Quit options.
  • Indexing queue — spaces are now indexed one at a time with visible queue status.
  • Background reindex now shows progress for spaces being indexed for the first time.
  • Compacted space info preview layout.
  • Fixed a bug where file modification times were not compared correctly, causing unnecessary re-indexing.
  • macOS: ~/Library is now automatically skipped during indexing.

Thank you for the continued support and feedback!

"}
